message:
refactor(persist): extend sqlite_master entry tracking to include type, tbl_name

Widen the master_entries tuple from (name, root_page, create_sql) to
(type, name, tbl_name, root_page, create_sql) to support persisting
indexes, views, and triggers alongside tables in the sqlite_master
leaf page. Previously only table entries were tracked, which meant
exported databases lost non-table schema objects.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
